# UMH Architecture and Runtime Procedures — XQVR7-ZEPHYR-CANARY-9F3K

## System Architecture

The UMH architecture uses a layered domain module structure.
Palace — the whole system. Wing — a top-level module.
The spine is the central execution layer connecting all modules.

## Runtime Execution

The cognitive loop is the primary runtime agent execution cycle.
Each agent follows a deterministic execution path.

## Governance Rules

1. All governance authority constraints must be validated
2. Approval policy requires founder review for critical actions
3. Primitives need full validity matrix

## Retrieval Protocol

Translate the user's question into a concern.
1. Translate. 2. Open room. 3. Read purpose. 4. Core loci.

## Memory and Persistence

Memory entries go through canonical persistence to the store.
Retrieval uses the memory palace for structured navigation.

## Deployment Checklist

- Import check passes
- Relevant test passes
- Deployment command provided via docker container service
